phases.name: PHASE 0 - Read First
notes: Repo-local skills/ritual/SKILL.md was not present; canonical Ritual skill was read from C:/Users/ibnub/.codex/skills/ritual-dapp-skills/skills/ritual/SKILL.md.
Current Ritual skill states: DO NOT USE INFERNET; Infernet is deprecated and replaced by enshrined precompiles.
No Infernet SDK package, job type format, or CallbackConsumer interface is provided by the current Ritual skill.

Implementation will not add an Infernet SDK package or CallbackConsumer inheritance. Tx-count verification remains a signed proof boundary so it can be wired to the current Ritual-approved attestation path.
Deployment completed on Ritual Chain after real CardNFT image URIs were added.

phases.name: PHASE 1 - Contracts
notes: CardNFT.sol, BadgeContract.sol, GachaContract.sol, and EnshrionedConsumer.sol written.
Foundry project compiled successfully with C:/Users/ibnub/.foundry/bin/forge.exe build.
Unit tests passed: 13 tests across BadgeContract, GachaContract, and CardNFT.
Ritual RPC chain-id check returned 1979.
Deploy.s.sol broadcast to Ritual Chain succeeded.
Deployed BadgeContract: 0xe92De90C26ECa062EA9273fD7c04903803244FA3.
Deployed GachaContract: 0xD4A7E3989b3C171cA318B794f57Bf123163A8dB3.

phases.name: PHASE 2 - Frontend Foundation
notes: Next.js 14 App Router app created under frontend/.
Installed RainbowKit, wagmi v2, viem, TanStack Query v5, Zustand, Sonner, Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS.
globals.css uses the requested design tokens and Google font variables.
layout.tsx wires RainbowKit, wagmi, TanStack Query, and app frame.
lib/wagmi.ts, lib/tiers.ts, and lib/store.ts created.

phases.name: PHASE 3 - Shared Components
notes: ParticleBackground, CustomCursor, CountUp, IntroScreen, Header, Footer, BadgeShield, CardDisplay, BadgeCeremony, GachaOverlay, and StatsCards created.
IntroScreen timer adjusted after browser QA found a React Strict Mode dev replay issue.

phases.name: PHASE 4 - Hooks
notes: useBadgeContract, useGachaContract, useCardNFT, and useLeaderboard created.
All chain reads use TanStack Query. Zustand remains UI-only.
Badge claim proof flow is env-backed signed tx-count attestation; no deprecated Infernet SDK added.

phases.name: PHASE 5 - Pages
notes: Landing, dashboard, collection, and hall-of-fame pages created.
Footer hidden on / and present on app routes.
Stats and collections read from deployed contract logs and contract reads.

phases.name: PHASE 6 - Integration & Polish
notes: frontend npm run build passed with transitive wallet optional-dependency warnings.
frontend npm run typecheck passed.
Local browser QA verified / and /dashboard render at http://127.0.0.1:3000.
NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID is set in frontend/.env.local.
frontend/.env.local contains deployed BadgeContract, GachaContract, CardNFT, and EnshrionedConsumer addresses.
Local /api/verify-txcount route added for tx-count attestation signing; frontend now defaults to that route instead of an external Infernet endpoint.
BadgeContract proofSigner rotated on Ritual Chain to the dedicated server-side verifier key stored in frontend/.env.local.
Gacha/Card/Badge/Leaderboard frontend reads pinned to Ritual Chain public client to avoid zero-data reads on wrong client state.
GachaOverlay now resumes an existing pending pull before requesting a new pull, preventing stuck reveal retries after a prior partial reveal.
useRequestPull now checks hasPendingPull/pendingPull on Ritual before opening the wallet, so an existing pending pull cannot trigger a reverting requestPull transaction.
Contract read hooks now use a dedicated viem Ritual HTTP client instead of wagmi usePublicClient, preventing browser/provider chain drift from returning zero data for deployed Ritual contracts.
GachaContract pendingPull now stores rarity, cardIndex, and exists; CardNFT mints the exact pending card instead of rolling again.
Frontend GachaOverlay now reads the confirmed GachaResult event and reveals the exact card selected by the contract.
Card artwork rendering now uses object-contain in CardDisplay and Hall of Fame legendary cards to avoid artwork cropping.
Badge claim and card mint fees are forwarded immediately to the contract owner, with withdraw retained as a fallback.
Frontend dev script now runs next dev --turbo, with scripts/warmup.mjs available to precompile the app routes.
The pendingPull struct and CardMinted/GachaResult event changes are ABI-breaking and require redeploying the updated contracts before the live frontend can use these env addresses.
Redeployed updated contracts to Ritual Chain after forge build and 13 Foundry tests passed.
Latest BadgeContract: 0xfba9cdc539516dCce257474A6e595ECD641f1954.
Latest GachaContract: 0xD1e598604EdDfB47C11B979EBA953357dC694cAf.
Latest CardNFT: 0xCb6558b290fdCbf5A1cBd3924641B40A83946B4E.
Latest EnshrionedConsumer: 0xdCd77EA21ef42BbAeE3357EA5d1496fde6BF6518.
frontend/.env.local updated to the latest deployed contract addresses.
Owner verified on-chain for all latest contracts as 0xeAde8866829334754c3796905A257A35BaE8b038.
Local dev server restarted with npm run dev; http://localhost:3000 returned 200 OK.
Full connect -> claim -> ceremony -> gacha -> mint -> collection E2E still depends on wallet interaction and the user meeting tier thresholds.
Debugged badge claim verification endpoint rejection after PROOF_SIGNER rotation.
frontend/app/api/verify-txcount/route.ts now forces dynamic execution and verifies the server signer address matches BadgeContract.proofSigner() before signing a tx-count proof.
frontend/hooks/useBadgeContract.ts now uses no-store for proof requests and surfaces the endpoint JSON error instead of masking every non-2xx response.
frontend/app/dashboard/page.tsx now catches toast-handled claim failures so endpoint rejections do not become unhandled runtime errors.
Local /api/verify-txcount returned 200 for wallet 0xF38F79Ff56A3725AfC5bDa872c1ecCF56D217C74 and the encoded proof simulated successfully against BadgeContract.claimBadge tier 0.
frontend npm run typecheck passed after verification fix.
frontend npm run build passed after verification fix: / 91 kB, /dashboard 219 kB, /collection 212 kB, /hall-of-fame 207 kB.
Fixed collection card images by adding CardNFT.cardMeta to frontend/lib/contracts.ts and mapping cardMeta ipfsImage directly to OwnedCard.image in frontend/hooks/useCardNFT.ts.
CardDisplay now warns when card.image is missing and renders artwork with an absolute object-contain image inside a 3/4 rounded bg-black/20 frame.
GachaOverlay minted phase now uses an overflow-y-auto fixed overlay with a fixed close button, top-start scrollable content, and max-w-xs card/button column.
frontend npm run typecheck passed after card display fixes.
frontend npm run build passed after card display fixes: / 91 kB, /dashboard 219 kB, /collection 212 kB, /hall-of-fame 208 kB.
UI/UX polish pass replaced hall-of-fame/page.tsx with the real leaderboard-driven Hall of Fame page.
CardDisplay was replaced to remove double aspect-ratio nesting; only the artwork area owns the aspect ratio.
Header now has active nav states and a mobile hamburger menu.
Dashboard wallet card, badge grid, and tier heading responsive classes were tightened.
Collection grid now uses a denser responsive layout and no external Framer wrapper around each CardDisplay.
GachaOverlay minted phase now centers content with constrained card width and a fixed SVG close button.
globals.css now includes nav-active, skeleton shimmer, and smooth scrollbar utilities.
useLeaderboard now returns firstEnshrined/topCollectors aliases for the new Hall page while preserving existing stats fields.
frontend npm run typecheck passed after UI/UX polish pass.
frontend npm run build passed after UI/UX polish pass: / 91 kB, /dashboard 219 kB, /collection 212 kB, /hall-of-fame 208 kB.
Verified deployed CardNFT.cardMeta tuple order is rarity, cardIndex, name, serial, ipfsImage, owner.
useOwnedCards now normalizes named and tuple cardMeta responses and maps ipfsImage to OwnedCard.image from tuple index 4.
Verified token 1 maps to the live Pinata image URL for Siggy The Cadet; Pinata returned 200 image/png.
frontend npm run typecheck passed after collection card image mapping fix.
frontend npm run build passed after collection card image mapping fix: / 91 kB, /dashboard 219 kB, /collection 212 kB, /hall-of-fame 208 kB.
Restarted the stale local Next dev process on port 3000; http://localhost:3000/collection returned 200 OK.
Confirmed viem returns CardNFT.cardMeta as an array tuple in this app, not named object properties; meta.ipfsImage is undefined while meta[4] is the live Pinata URL.
useOwnedCards now uses explicit typed tuple destructuring for cardMeta and maps tuple ipfsImage directly to card.image.
useMintCard was verified to map CardMinted args.ipfsImage to OwnedCard.image.
frontend npm run typecheck and npm run build passed after explicit cardMeta tuple extraction; /collection stayed at 212 kB First Load JS.
Audited reveal-to-mint-to-collection image flow: existing minted CardNFT metadata for token 1 and token 2 both has non-empty Pinata image URLs.
Fixed CardDisplay image fallback so image failures are React-controlled and reset on fresh card data instead of imperatively hiding the img DOM node.
Fixed GachaOverlay minted phase to render the CardMinted event result directly instead of overriding it with local preview CARD_DATA.
frontend npm run typecheck and npm run build passed after the image display audit fixes.
useOwnedCards now reads CardNFT.cardMeta via named properties with indexed fallback and cache-busts collection data with query version v3.
CardDisplay now requires a trimmed http image URL before rendering img and resets image failure state on load or fresh card data.
frontend npm run typecheck and npm run build passed after the v3 collection image cache-busting fix.
CardNFT.mintCard now mints before external calls, consumes the pending pull after mint, emits CardMinted, then attempts fee forwarding last without reverting if forwarding fails.
Deploy.s.sol now deploys BadgeContract, GachaContract, CardNFT, and EnshrionedConsumer directly with OWNER_WALLET and only calls setCardNFT during deploy when owner equals deployer.
forge build and forge test -vv passed after the contract fixes: 13 tests passed.

Redeployed contracts to Ritual Chain: BadgeContract 0x6d59c85D41830e75be33Db94dc80BD078Fa9417f, GachaContract 0x80Aae11f82a4cAD612D1084021A5806E1F1ce822, CardNFT 0x3A7EAE0ba639527C3A48F01047a17d3d2686C6Ea, EnshrionedConsumer 0x5D1e5e69782be627f0Cc0e09c4f146453c665495.

Verified all new contracts owner() return 0xeAde8866829334754c3796905A257A35BaE8b038, BadgeContract.proofSigner() returns 0x81b95d1f693aF09646Be50fdD51C7D901C89338A, and GachaContract.cardNFT() is 0x3A7EAE0ba639527C3A48F01047a17d3d2686C6Ea.
frontend/.env.local updated to the redeployed contract addresses.
useOwnedCards now cache-busts collection reads with query version v4 and reads CardNFT.cardMeta via named properties with indexed fallback.
Live contract-level E2E completed on Ritual Chain with owner wallet: claimed tier 0, requested pull, minted CardNFT token 1 Siggy The Chef, and verified its Pinata image URL.
frontend npm run typecheck and npm run build passed after redeploy/env update; /, /dashboard, /collection, and /hall-of-fame returned 200 on the restarted dev server.
